title: Bruno Gaillard
compiled_truth: Bruno Gaillard is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-09-01 to 2001-11-08), Bruno Gaillard sent 53 and received 241 emails, totalling 294 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (36), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (24), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (22), [Sandra McCubbin](people/sandra-mccubbin) (18), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (16). Mailbox folders observed: personal.
